DOWNTOWN LONGMONT EVENTS / COMMUNITY SIGNAL

Review community signal from Downtown Longmont events
Verification
Needs verification
High priority

Open Mic @ Bricks On Main- Every Tuesday

Why now: Dark-signal pattern detected from recent evidence.

Before publishing: Confirm the signal against source records or a second public source before drafting.

Why this was flagged

Community or weakly verified signals can reveal early civic risk, but they must be verified before they become publishable evidence.

Suggested next step

Check for matching official records, agenda packets, land records, business registrations, meeting video, and at least one independent local source before drafting.

Open source and review
Source #13

CITY EVENTS / EVENT

City Council Meeting Canceled
Watch
Watch
Medium priority

The City Council meeting scheduled for June 30th has been canceled, potentially affecting council agenda items and public participation.

Why now: The June 30th City Council meeting has been canceled, which may affect upcoming agendas and public involvement.

Novelty: 2/5

Before publishing: Confirmation of the cancellation reason, rescheduling information, or any public impact.

Why this was flagged

This change in schedule could impact upcoming city decisions and public engagement opportunities. Suggested treatment: watch. Newsworthiness: 10/20 (immediacy 4, impact 3, conflict 1, novelty 2). Why now: The June 30th City Council meeting has been canceled, which may affect upcoming agendas and public involvement.

Suggested next step

Contact the City Clerk's office for more information on why the meeting was canceled and if it will be rescheduled. What would make this publishable: Confirmation of the cancellation reason, rescheduling information, or any public impact.

Open source and review
Aggregated across sources

CITY OF LONGMONT EVENTS PAGE / PUBLIC NOTICE

Longmont City Council Meeting Rescheduled
Brief
Ready to draft
High priority

The originally scheduled Tuesday, June 30 City Council meeting was canceled and rescheduled for July 1 at 7 pm.

Why now: The city council meeting was canceled and rescheduled for July 1 at 7 pm.

Novelty: 4/5

Before publishing: A detailed agenda of the new City Council meeting, any changes in agenda items, or public feedback on the rescheduling.

Why this was flagged

This change in the council meeting schedule may affect public participation and agenda items. Suggested treatment: brief. Newsworthiness: 14/20 (immediacy 5, impact 3, conflict 2, novelty 4). Why now: The city council meeting was canceled and rescheduled for July 1 at 7 pm.

Suggested next step

Check the City Council agenda for any changes or new items added due to the rescheduling. What would make this publishable: A detailed agenda of the new City Council meeting, any changes in agenda items, or public feedback on the rescheduling.

No original source URL
Aggregated across sources

CITY OF LONGMONT EVENTS PAGE / EVENTS

Summer Programs at Longmont Youth Center
Watch
Watch
Medium priority

The Youth Center is hosting a series of summer programs including Navigators, Glam Group, and Make it Better from July 2 to 5 pm.

Why now: Summer programs are scheduled at the Youth Center from July 2 to 5 pm.

Novelty: 5/5

Before publishing: Detailed descriptions of each program, fees, registration information, and any special guest speakers or activities.

Why this was flagged

These youth-focused events have public impact on children's activities during the school break. Suggested treatment: watch. Newsworthiness: 13/20 (immediacy 4, impact 3, conflict 1, novelty 5). Why now: Summer programs are scheduled at the Youth Center from July 2 to 5 pm.

Suggested next step

Check for additional details such as program descriptions, fees, or registration information. What would make this publishable: Detailed descriptions of each program, fees, registration information, and any special guest speakers or activities.

No original source URL
Aggregated across sources

CITY OF LONGMONT EVENTS PAGE / EVENTS

Spanish-English Conversation Group
Background
Background
Low priority

The Longmont Public Library is hosting a Spanish-English conversation group for language learners every Thursday from 1 pm to 2 pm.

Why now: The library hosts a weekly Spanish-English conversation group for language learners.

Novelty: 4/5

Before publishing: More details on the event format, participants, and any success stories or feedback from attendees.

Why this was flagged

This event promotes community engagement and provides resources for non-native speakers. Suggested treatment: background. Newsworthiness: 9/20 (immediacy 2, impact 2, conflict 1, novelty 4). Why now: The library hosts a weekly Spanish-English conversation group for language learners.

Suggested next step

Provide details on the location, frequency, and any additional resources or support available. What would make this publishable: More details on the event format, participants, and any success stories or feedback from attendees.

No original source URL
Aggregated across sources
